basic_details.job_title: EdCIL General Manager (Business Development) Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Educational Consultants India (EdCIL) (EdCIL) General Manager (Business Development) Notification 2026 has been released on 10 April 2026 on the official website EdCIL. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the EdCIL General Manager (Business Development) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 44 years (as on last date of application)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 44 years (as on 30-04-2026) Relaxations: OBC: 3 years, Ex-servicemen: 5 years, PwD: 10 years, Internal Candidates: 7 years, J&K Domicile: 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Engineering & Technology, Science, Arts, Management and relevant areas.
qualification.details: General Manager (Business Development): Post Graduate in Engineering & Technology, Science, Arts, Management and relevant areas. Minimum 12 years post-qualification work experience in relevant areas, including business development/marketing, research and analytics in education, social sector and development sector economics, and industrial development.

salary_details.details: IDA Pay Scale ₹ 80000-220000 Entitled to IDA, Perks, HRA/Leased accommodation, Performance Related Pay (PRP), PF, Leave Encashment, Medical Facilities

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the EdCIL General Manager (Business Development) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 18-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of EdCIL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for the General Manager post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the position of General Manager (Business Development) at EdCIL for the year 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for EdCIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the General Manager (Business Development) position is 18 May 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate degree in Engineering & Technology, Science, Arts, Management, or other relevant areas to be eligible for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the General Manager position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 44 years as of the last date of application, with specific relaxations provided for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the General Manager (Business Development) position at EdCIL is offered on a contract basis for a tenure of 5 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary scale for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be placed in the IDA Pay Scale of ₹ 80,000 to ₹ 2,20,000, along with additional perks and allowances.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates must apply online through the official EdCIL career portal at https://www.edcilindia.co.in/ECareers before the specified deadline.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the EdCIL General Manager (Business Development) recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for EdCIL?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of two stages: shortlisting of candidates based on their qualifications and experience, followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q10. Do I need to send a hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: Only employees from Government Departments, PSUs, or Autonomous bodies are required to forward a hard copy of their application through the proper channel within 15 days.
